expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema and migration",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a status column on the tasks table defaulting to 'pending' so that statuses can be persisted.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Status column added to tasks table",
        "Allowed values are pending, in progress, and done",
        "Default value is pending",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want the backend to support updating a task's status so that progress is saved.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint/action handles status updates",
        "Validates status input",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see the current status badge on task cards so that I know its progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display status badge",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can easily update my work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list row has a control to change status",
        "Selecting a new status triggers the backend update",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can see only relevant tasks.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes a filter for status",
        "Selecting a status updates the list to show only matching tasks",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
